commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared SignInPrompt, replaces several signed-out route screens and inline comment prompts with it, and adds component plus /stars tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is a UI consolidation PR, so the review checked live PR state, diff, downloaded screenshots, current-main overlap, and path history rather than reproducing a failing bug.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can rebase the component extraction and keep current /stars behavior while replacing only signed-out prompt UI.

target.title: feat: unify signed-out screens with SignInPrompt component
target.body:
## Summary

Unifies all signed-out screens with a single `SignInPrompt` component that replicates the polished design from `/settings`. This eliminates visual inconsistencies across auth-gated routes.

## What changed

- **New component:** `src/components/SignInPrompt.tsx` — gradient backdrop, blur, card with shadow, `LockKeyhole` icon, styled "Sign in with GitHub" button.
- **Replaced ad-hoc UI on:** `/settings`, `/dashboard`, `/import`, `/stars`, `/cli/auth`, `/docs/auth`.
- **Inline comments:** Replaced plain "Sign in to comment." text in `SoulDetailPage` and `SkillCommentsPanel` with a compact `SignInButton size="sm"`.
- **Tests:** Added `SignInPrompt.test.tsx` (8 tests).
- **Fixes:** Restored missing `EmptyState`/`Container` imports lost during formatting; fixed `stars.tsx` loading logic so unauthenticated users see the prompt immediately instead of a skeleton.

## Visual comparison

### /settings
| Before (Light) | After (Light) | Before (Dark) | After (Dark) |
|---|---|---|---|
| ![settings before light](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/settings-before-light.png) | ![settings after light](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/settings-after-light.png) | ![settings before dark](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/settings-before-dark.png) | ![settings after dark](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/settings-after-dark.png) |

### /stars
| Before (Light) | After (Light) | Before (Dark) | After (Dark) |
|---|---|---|---|
| ![stars before light](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/stars-before-light.png) | ![stars after light](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/stars-after-light.png) | ![stars before dark](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/stars-before-dark.png) | ![stars after dark](https://wintry-ether-fss5.here.now/stars-after-dark.png) |

- `bun run build` ✅
- `bun run format:check` ✅
- `bun run lint` ✅
- `bun run test` ✅ (1,790 tests passed with `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid`)
- `codex review --base origin/main` ✅
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run build` ✅
